mapper.select: select a.inspcd, b.CDNM as insp_nm from pd_insp_clsfy a left outer join HPBA900T_TBL b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.inspcd = b.CODE and b.CDGBN = '830' and b.REMARK = 'kor' where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} order by a.inspcd

select a.inspcd, a.err_type, b.cdnm as err_type_nm, a.cmpycd, a.insp_gb from pd_insp_err_type a left outer join HPBA900T_TBL b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.err_type = b.CODE and b.cdgbn = '840' where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.insp_gb = #{insp_gb} and a.inspcd = #{inspcd} order by a.err_type
